definition:
ἔξωθεν 
 adv. (ἔξω opposite to ἔσωθεν), [in LXX for חוּץ ;] 
  1. prop. (in answer to the question, Whence ?), from without: Mrk.7:18 
   2. More often (= ἔξω; cf. Bl., § 25, 3), without: Mat.23:27-28 Mrk.7:18, 2Co.7:5; τὸ ἔ., Mat.23:25, Luk.11:39-40; οἱ ἔ., 1Ti.3:7, Mrk.4:11 (WH, mg.); ὁ ἔ. κόσμος, 1Pe.3:3; ἐκβάλλειν ἔ., Rev.11:2. As prep. with genitive: Mrk.7:15, Rev.11:1-19 4Ki.14:20 (cf. Robertson, Gr., 548).†
 (AS)
